name: @jeldon/competitive-intel
description: Domain-agnostic local-competitor intelligence: one bundled site auditor (homepage + schema + sitemap + PSI + GBP + page-stats + template-vendor detection + reused @jeldon/core-scoring GEO citability) importable from both an SSR Function and a Node cron, plus Claude-backed positioning extraction, a streaming gap report, and SerpApi local-pack rank tracking. Ported from Body of Health competitor-scanner.ts + audit-competitors.mjs + competitor-positioning.ts + competitor-gap-report.ts + keyword-ranks.ts.
